_EDIT_INSTRUCTIONS: You can safely add or remove analyst names in this file. Names must match EXACTLY as they appear in the Excel workbook. Save the file, then restart the app to see changes.

us_da_team._comment: US-based Data Analysts — managed by Kiara and Josefina. Add new analysts here when they join. Remove (or move to review_flags.departed) when they leave.

ph_da_team._comment: Philippines-based Data Analysts — managed by Auie.

dqs_team._comment: Data Quality Specialists. Analysts here are shown in the DQS table instead of the DA tables.

exclude_entirely._comment: Analysts on other teams (Team Kennedy, etc.) who appear in the Excel but are NOT part of this team. They will be silently excluded from all output.

review_flags._comment: Analysts shown below a separator in their table with a flag. They are NOT included in workload averages. Update this list rather than deleting entries — it creates a record.

partial_data._reason: Analyst's full workload is not yet in the spreadsheet

departed._reason: Analyst has left the company — remove their feeds from the sheet

cross_collab._reason: Analyst is from another team, shown for visibility only

other_roles._reason: Not a DA or DQS role

name_aliases._comment: Maps old or alternate spellings to the correct name. Key = name as it appears in Excel, Value = correct canonical name. Useful for married name changes.
